vi.name: NestJS 2025 Roadmap
vi.summary: Lộ trình này bám theo bài '2025 NestJS BE Roadmap: Beginner to Senior Level' trên DEV, chia hành trình thành 4 stage: Fresher, Junior, Mid-Level và Senior.

milestones.title: Fresher (Entry-Level)
milestones.description: Nền tảng bắt đầu với Modules, Controllers, Services, Dependency Injection, Decorators, REST APIs bằng DTOs, validation, database integration và CRUD basics.

milestones.title: Junior Developer
milestones.description: Level này đi vào Middleware, Guards, Interceptors, Pipes, JWT authentication, RBAC, error handling, Swagger và testing với Jest trên các ứng dụng thật hơn.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Developer
milestones.description: Tập trung vào microservices, OAuth2/SSO, Redis caching, WebSockets, database optimization, Docker/cloud deployment, CI/CD và mentoring.

milestones.title: Senior Developer
milestones.description: Chặng senior bao phủ system design, DDD, CQRS/Event Sourcing, tracing/logging, event-driven architecture, security, DevOps mastery, open source và leadership.

outcomes: Có một roadmap NestJS 2025 rõ ràng từ entry-level đến senior-level dựa trên bài viết nguồn.
Biết thứ tự học từ REST API cơ bản, guards, testing đến microservices, DDD và event-driven systems.
Có 12 project gợi ý xuyên suốt 4 stage để biến phần học lý thuyết thành practice cụ thể hơn.
Dễ map hơn giữa mục tiêu nghề nghiệp backend và các kỹ năng NestJS cần học tiếp theo.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người học backend bằng TypeScript muốn có một progression rõ ràng từ Fresher tới Senior thay vì chỉ học rời từng feature trong NestJS.
items: Node.js developer muốn chuyển sang backend có structure tốt hơn với NestJS
Frontend/fullstack developer muốn mở rộng sang backend TypeScript bài bản
Người đang cần roadmap nghề nghiệp từ CRUD API cơ bản tới microservices và system design

en.name: NestJS 2025 Roadmap
en.summary: This roadmap follows the DEV article '2025 NestJS BE Roadmap: Beginner to Senior Level' and organizes the journey into four stages: Fresher, Junior, Mid-Level, and Senior.

milestones.title: Fresher (Entry-Level)
milestones.description: Begin with Modules, Controllers, Services, Dependency Injection, Decorators, REST APIs with DTOs, validation, database integration, and CRUD fundamentals.

milestones.title: Junior Developer
milestones.description: Move into Middleware, Guards, Interceptors, Pipes, JWT auth, RBAC, exception handling, Swagger, and Jest-based testing for more real-world applications.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Developer
milestones.description: Focus on microservices, OAuth2/SSO, Redis caching, WebSockets, advanced database work, Docker/cloud deployment, CI/CD, and mentoring responsibilities.

milestones.title: Senior Developer
milestones.description: Cover system design, DDD, CQRS/Event Sourcing, tracing and logging, event-driven architecture, security, DevOps mastery, open source, and leadership.

outcomes: Follow a NestJS 2025 progression from entry-level foundations to senior-level architecture concerns.
See a clearer sequence from CRUD APIs and guards into testing, microservices, DDD, and event-driven systems.
Use the 12 suggested projects from the article as practical anchors across the four stages.
Map backend career growth more easily onto concrete NestJS topics and responsibilities.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for TypeScript backend learners who want a staged progression from Fresher to Senior instead of learning NestJS features in isolation.
items: Node.js developers moving into a more structured NestJS backend stack
Frontend or fullstack developers expanding into production-minded TypeScript backend work
Backend learners who want a career-oriented roadmap from CRUD APIs to microservices and system design

ja.name: NestJS 2025 Roadmap
ja.summary: このロードマップは DEV の記事 '2025 NestJS BE Roadmap: Beginner to Senior Level' をベースに、Fresher、Junior、Mid-Level、Senior の 4 段階で整理しています。

milestones.title: Fresher (Entry-Level)
milestones.description: Modules、Controllers、Services、Dependency Injection、Decorators、DTO を使った REST API、validation、database integration、CRUD の基礎から始めます。

milestones.title: Junior Developer
milestones.description: Middleware、Guards、Interceptors、Pipes、JWT auth、RBAC、exception handling、Swagger、Jest testing に進み、より実務的な API を扱います。

milestones.title: Mid-Level Developer
milestones.description: microservices、OAuth2/SSO、Redis caching、WebSockets、database optimization、Docker/cloud deployment、CI/CD、mentoring を学びます。

milestones.title: Senior Developer
milestones.description: system design、DDD、CQRS/Event Sourcing、tracing/logging、event-driven architecture、security、DevOps mastery、open source、leadership を整理します。

outcomes: entry-level から senior-level までの NestJS 2025 ロードマップを段階的に追えます。
CRUD API や guards から testing、microservices、DDD、event-driven systems まで順序立てて進めます。
記事内の 12 suggested projects を各段階の実践テーマとして使えます。
backend career growth を NestJS の具体的なトピックと責務に結びつけやすくなります。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: TypeScript backend を学ぶ人で、NestJS の機能を単発で学ぶのではなく Fresher から Senior までの progression を欲しい人に向いています。
items: より structure のある NestJS backend に進みたい Node.js developer
production-minded な TypeScript backend に広げたい frontend / fullstack developer
CRUD API から microservices、system design まで career-oriented な roadmap が欲しい学習者
